ddls:
CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "age" TEXT /* Age of the participant */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the participant */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade level of the participant */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the participant */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the participant in centimeters */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "parental_consent" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if parental consent is given */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the participant */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential address of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health metric entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "bmi" REAL /* Body Mass Index of the participant */,
  "weight_kg" REAL /* Weight of the participant in kilograms */,
  "height_cm" REAL /* Height of the participant in centimeters */,
  "blood_pressure" TEXT /* Blood pressure of the participant */,
  "heart_rate" INTEGER /* Heart rate of the participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health metric record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the health metric record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_metrics_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "behavioral_responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each behavioral response entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "texting_while_driving" TEXT /* Behavior related to texting while driving in the last 30 days */,
  "smoked_ever" TEXT /* History of smoking ever */,
  "bullied_past_12mo" TEXT /* Experience of being bullied in the last 12 months */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* History of alcohol consumption */,
  "drug_use" TEXT /* History of drug use */,
  "seatbelt_usage" TEXT /* Behavior related to seatbelt usage */,
  "physical_activity" TEXT /* Level of physical activity */,
  "mental_health" TEXT /* Mental health status (e.g., anxiety, depression) */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey instance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the behavioral response record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the behavioral response record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_responses_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_behavioral_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey instance */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was conducted */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the survey (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was last updated */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school conducting the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants_surveys" (
  "participant_survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the participant-survey relationship */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the survey */,
  "completed_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the survey was completed by the participant */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-survey relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the participant-survey relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_surveys_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_surveys_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "district" TEXT /* School district the school belongs to */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the school record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_participants" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant enrolled in the school */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the enrollment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_participants_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for system access */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Residential or office address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action taken (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id")
)
